_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.

Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Acquisition of Northlake Patient Systems LLC by Avenwell Health Bancorp, Inc. (US issuer listed on the Midland Exchange).
Structure: All-stock merger; consideration, exchange ratio, and earn-out terms are TBD and will be disclosed, if any, via a public Form 8-K.
Financing: Anticipated revolving facility and bridge commitment subject to diligence; GLBA and HIPAA controls to be certified prior to signing.
Integration: Employee and benefits information to be shared only in anonymized form; no payroll, SSN, or account-level data will be requested before closing.
Approvals: HSR filing, state health notifications, and customary banking supervisory non-objection required; closing targeted for Q4 2025.
Binding effect: Non-binding except for confidentiality and exclusivity placeholders; any definitive agreement will be announced through a broadly disseminated press release and Form 8-K.

Contacts: Investor Relations mailbox ir@avenwell.example and Media Relations media@avenwell.example; responses will not be provided to personal email addresses.
Form placeholders (not to be completed in this document): SSN ___-__-____ (example 000-12-3456 invalid), US Passport No. _________ (example 123456789 invalid), City Business License BL-000000 (template).
Template remittance (invalid and for illustration only): ABA 000000000, Account 1234567890, Beneficiary Avenwell Escrow Department, Remit-to Address 100 Example Ave., Suite 200, Capital City, ZZ 99999

must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Acquisition of Northlake Patient Systems LLC by Avenwell Health Bancorp, Inc. (US issuer listed on the Midland Exchange).
Structure: All-stock merger; consideration, exchange ratio, and earn-out terms are TBD and will be disclosed, if any, via a public Form 8-K.
Financing: Anticipated revolving facility and bridge commitment subject to diligence; GLBA and HIPAA controls to be certified prior to signing.
Integration: Employee and benefits information to be shared only in anonymized form; no payroll, SSN, or account-level data will be requested before closing.
Approvals: HSR filing, state health notifications, and customary banking supervisory non-objection required; closing targeted for Q4 2025.
Binding effect: Non-binding except for confidentiality and exclusivity placeholders; any definitive agreement will be announced through a broadly disseminated press release and Form 8-K.

Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Acquisition of Northlake Patient Systems LLC by Avenwell Health Bancorp, Inc. (US issuer listed on the Midland Exchange).
Parties: Avenwell Health Bancorp, Inc. (EIN 54-3216549) and Northlake Patient Systems LLC; no individual advisors or named persons are identified in this draft.
Structure: All-stock merger; consideration, exchange ratio, and earn-out terms are TBD and will be disclosed, if any, via a public Form 8-K.
Regulatory: Communications will comply with Reg FD and Rule 10b-5; no selective disclosure to analysts, lenders, employees, or other covered market actors.
Public information: This summary reflects only public, already-announced facts as of May 1, 2025 and does not contain material non-public information.
Financing: Anticipated revolving facility and bridge commitment subject to diligence; GLBA and HIPAA controls to be certified prior to signing.
Diligence: No patient-level, consumer, or household PII will be shared pre-close; use de-identified datasets and aggregated KPIs in the data room.
Integration: Employee and benefits information to be shared only in anonymized form; no payroll, SSN, or account-level data will be requested before closing.
Approvals: HSR filing, state health notifications, and customary banking supervisory non-objection required; closing targeted for Q4 2025.
Public channels: Investor webcast and slide deck to be posted at investors.avenwell.example/events and filed on EDGAR; dial-in via public helpline 800-555-0100.
Contacts: Investor Relations mailbox ir@avenwell.example and Media Relations media@avenwell.example; responses will not be provided to personal email addresses.
Form placeholders (not to be completed in this document): SSN ___-__-____ (example 000-12-3456 invalid), US Passport No. _________ (example 123456789 invalid), City Business License BL-000000 (template).
Template remittance (invalid and for illustration only): ABA 000000000, Account 1234567890, Beneficiary Avenwell Escrow Department, Remit-to Address 100 Example Ave., Suite 200, Capital City, ZZ 99999.
Binding effect: Non-binding except for confidentiality and exclusivity placeholders; any definitive agreement will be announced through a broadly disseminated press release and Form 8-K.
